action.reasoning: Observation: Test spearman improved to 0.8407 after wt-subtraction fine-tuning (iter 11 training). Remaining time ~28 min, enough for short fine-tuning and eval. Analysis: The model likely hasn't fully converged; lowering lr and a few more epochs could further improve generalization. Decision: Resume training from best checkpoint with lr=1e-5 for 2 epochs, save best checkpoint based on val spearman, then submit eval within remaining time.
